narrative:
Springboro City 2-D (precinct in Warren County) has 1,040 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.2 percentage points.
